top_priority.title: Delete InfoIcon + converter.ts (paired dead code)
top_priority.rationale: Zero importers across src/; InfoIcon is the only consumer of capitalizeFirst, so deleting both as a pair is safe and shrinks surface area before refactor begins.
key_behaviors_to_preserve: Confirm zero importers one more time before deletion
Delete both files in a single change to keep tree clean

top_priority.title: Delete unused TotalProjectCard component
top_priority.rationale: Zero importers; appears to have been replaced by PortfolioCard. Removes a duplicate placeholder URL site as a side benefit, simplifying B-007.
key_behaviors_to_preserve: Verify no barrel re-export, no test references

top_priority.title: Delete unused CrazyAboutSection
top_priority.rationale: Not imported by HomePage or any other module. Removes a bg-slate-* site, cutting one consumer from the eventual token sweep.
key_behaviors_to_preserve: i18n keys (crazyAbout*) become orphan but cleanup is out of scope

top_priority.title: Delete unused useIntersectionObserver hook
top_priority.rationale: Zero importers; codebase already standardized on framer-motion useInView. The file also has a stale-closure bug, so deletion beats fixing.

top_priority.title: Rename ShootingStart.tsx -> ShootingStar.tsx (typo fix)
top_priority.rationale: Single import to update; component export is already 'ShootingStar'. Use git mv to preserve history.
key_behaviors_to_preserve: Update DeveloperIntro import path
Use git mv (preserve blame)

top_priority.title: Centralize easings (PROJECT_CARD_EASE) into design-tokens
top_priority.rationale: Move easing arrays to design-tokens.easings.{projectCard, toast, standard}. Re-export PROJECT_CARD_EASE from the hook for back-compat so the existing test mock keeps working.
key_behaviors_to_preserve: Existing PROJECT_CARD_EASE export name preserved (re-export)
Test mock at ProjectsSection.test.tsx:172 keeps the same import path
Keep the [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1] tuple typed as a tuple, not number[]

top_priority.title: Extract placeholder constants + image-fallback helper (PLACEHOLDER_* + createImageFallbackHandler)
top_priority.rationale: The placeholder URL constant and the handleImageError closure are the same problem at two scopes; extracting both at once avoids touching the same lines twice. Tested consumers (PortfolioCard, PreparingCard) anchor the change.
key_behaviors_to_preserve: Set e.currentTarget.onerror = null to prevent infinite loops
Honor caller-provided width/height/text/bg/fg
Optional onAfter callback for ProjectDetailPage's setIsLoaded(true)
Standardize on placehold.co host (drop ProjectDetailComponent's via.placeholder.com — flag in PR)
Update PortfolioCard/PreparingCard tests to import the constant rather than the literal URL

top_priority.title: Extract useBodyScrollLock hook (replaces empty stub)
top_priority.rationale: Hook file already exists empty; both consumers reimplement it inline. AiDevKitModal test explicitly verifies prior overflow value is restored — preserving snapshot semantics is required.
key_behaviors_to_preserve: no-op when active is false
snapshot prior document.body.style.overflow on activation
set overflow='hidden' while active
restore the snapshotted value (NOT '') on cleanup
AiDevKitModal effect must be split: scroll-lock into hook, Escape listener stays inline (or moves to B-009)

top_priority.title: Extract useEscapeKey hook
top_priority.rationale: Naturally extracted alongside B-008 since AiDevKitModal's combined effect must be untangled anyway. Tests already cover close-on-Escape.
key_behaviors_to_preserve: no-op when handler is null/undefined or active=false
use latest-handler ref pattern
attach to window keydown, dispose on cleanup

top_priority.title: Extract useDisclosure (boolean expand/collapse) hook
top_priority.rationale: All three consumers tested. Mechanical pattern; provides explicit open/close so PortfolioCard's hover handlers adopt cleanly.
key_behaviors_to_preserve: Initial value defaults to false
toggle uses functional updater
expose explicit open/close for hover-driven sites

top_priority.title: Extract useCopyToClipboardWithToast hook
top_priority.rationale: Single tested consumer today; hook fixes the orphan-setTimeout race in current inline code. Pulls 3000ms into design-tokens.toastVisibleMs to keep keyframe and timer in sync.
key_behaviors_to_preserve: navigator.clipboard.writeText with success/failure branches
toast auto-clears after durationMs (default 3000ms = toastVisibleMs)
track success flag separately from message
cancel pending clear timer on unmount or rapid copy()

top_priority.title: Extract useClickOutside hook
top_priority.rationale: Single tested consumer (PageHeader). Worth lifting now since any future modal/popover will want it; mechanical and reversible.
key_behaviors_to_preserve: Only attach mousedown listener while active
Use mousedown (not click) to fire before focus changes
Remove listener on cleanup AND when active flips false

top_priority.title: Extract Chip primitive (consolidates pill class combos)
top_priority.rationale: Highest-frequency duplicate (9 sites, 4 distinct tones). Lifting the chip primitive supersedes any token-only combo refactor and lets B-016/B-018 reuse the right tones from day one. NumberedPill kept separate to avoid overloading the API.
key_behaviors_to_preserve: tones: accentSoft, accentSolid, neutralSoft, outlined
sizes: sm (text-xs), md (text-sm)
rounded-full pill shape
outlined uses border-line bg-surface text-content-secondary font-semibold
neutralSoft (PreparingCard) keeps bg-slate-200 — flag for token migration in deferred sweep

top_priority.title: Extract ModalShell primitive (consumes useBodyScrollLock + useEscapeKey)
top_priority.rationale: AiDevKitModal is tested and anchors the refactor; ContactModal gains Escape + scroll-lock as a positive behavior change. Must come after the hooks land so the primitive can consume them.
key_behaviors_to_preserve: fixed inset-0 z-50 backdrop with bg-black/50-55 + optional backdrop-blur-sm
click on backdrop -> onClose; click on panel stops propagation
panel uses rounded-modal + bg-surface + shadow-2xl + animate-fade-in-up
Escape closes via useEscapeKey
body overflow lock via useBodyScrollLock
Children remain a free slot — header markup differs across consumers
Adding Escape+scroll-lock to ContactModal is a deliberate positive change

top_priority.title: Extract FlippableCard primitive (3D flip wrapper)
top_priority.rationale: Pure presentational extraction. PortfolioCard tests anchor the visual contract; ProjectFlipPreviewCard differs only in driver (hover vs auto-rotate) and aspect class.
key_behaviors_to_preserve: outer perspective:1000px wrapper
inner preserve-3d transform-style + transition-transform duration-700
rotateY 180deg/0deg controlled by isFlipped prop
two absolute faces with backfaceVisibility: hidden
back face rotateY(180deg) baseline
aspect/sizing comes from caller — primitive does not hard-code

deferred.title: Extract useToggleSet (Set add/delete toggle)
deferred.reason: ResumePreviewPage (3 of 5 occurrences) has zero test coverage — refactoring its toggles in lockstep is risky until characterization tests land for that 1048-line page.

deferred.title: Extract useFetchJson / useLocalizedResource
deferred.reason: Marked high-risk by scout — InfoPost and ResumePreviewPage are untested consumers, prefetch-cache vs no-cache shapes diverge, and InfoPost duplicates ProfileSection's introduction.json fetch (a behavioral consolidation, not pure refactor).

deferred.title: Extract ProjectCardFrame shell (square thumbnail + title + subtitle + badge)
deferred.reason: ProjectFlipPreviewCard variant is untested and overlay placement (Vibe badge, sticker) diverges across the three sites; B-013 (Chip) covers the highest-value sub-extraction first.

deferred.title: Extract ExpandableCard primitive (chevron header + collapsible body)
deferred.reason: WorkExperienceCard uses max-h transition while AiDevKit cards use conditional render — standardizing animation is a real UX choice and WorkSection/WorkExperienceCard are untested.

deferred.title: Extract CardSkeleton placeholder
deferred.reason: Single current callsite; scout itself flagged 'extract only if more loading states are coming'.

deferred.title: Extract ExternalLinkArrowIcon + consolidate icon module
deferred.reason: Pure icon move; safe but low-value alone. Bundle into a follow-up icon-consolidation PR with AiDevKitModal/icons.tsx.

deferred.title: Extract LinkButton primitive
deferred.reason: Single consumer today; defer until ContactModal/PageHeader Info button refactors create the second and third reuse sites.

deferred.title: Extract InfoCell primitive
deferred.reason: Cosmetic with two sites; pair with TotalSummaryComponent overview refactor rather than landing standalone.

deferred.title: Replace bg-slate-* / border-slate-* / text-slate-* with surface/content/line tokens
deferred.reason: Large 60-occurrence sweep; should run AFTER B-013/B-014/B-015 land so the primitives bake in the right tokens and we don't churn the same lines twice. Plus ResumePreviewPage (24 of 60 sites) is untested.

deferred.title: Extract card-shell utility (rounded-3xl border-line bg-surface/80 backdrop-blur)
deferred.reason: 9 sites including AwardCard/CertificationCard/WorkExperienceCard which are untested. Pair with D-004 ExpandableCard once those have characterization tests.

deferred.title: Extract resume-preview card primitives + hardcoded backgrounds + arbitrary radii
deferred.reason: All three center on ResumePreviewPage which has zero tests; print/PDF visual regression risk is high. Bundle as a single resume-page refactor after characterization tests are written.

deferred.title: Add polaroid shadow tokens + indigo glow tokens + card-title min-height utilities
deferred.reason: Visual delicacy: polaroid shadows, sheen on PortfolioCard hover, and divergent card-title min-heights (3.2/3.3/3.6/3.8rem) require browser verification and a UX decision on whether divergence is intentional. Defer until visual regression tooling exists or designer confirms.

deferred.title: Extract magic 300ms card-exit navigation delay
deferred.reason: Truly minor; bundle into B-006 follow-up if a touch-up PR happens, otherwise not worth a standalone change.
